module:
Tag extraction strategies for automatic tagging.

This package provides various strategies for extracting tags from content
using different techniques including linguistic analysis, pattern matching,
and embedding-based approaches.

register_tag_strategy.docstring: Decorator to register a tag extraction strategy.

get_tag_strategy.docstring: Get a tag extraction strategy by name or enum.

get_cached_strategy.docstring: Get a cached tag extraction strategy by name or enum.

create_for_content_type.docstring: Create appropriate tag extraction strategy for a content type.

create_chain.docstring: Create a chain of tag extraction strategies.

extract_tags.docstring: Extract tags from text using the appropriate strategy.

extract_tags_with_chunking.docstring: Extract tags with content chunking for more contextual awareness.
